product: Genie visualization and query result improvements
tagline: Text explanations for empty results: Genie now includes text explanations of query results when query results are empty.
what_it_does: Text explanations for empty results: Genie now includes text explanations of query results when query results are empty. Improved auto generated charts: Visualizations now use query result metadata for higher quality auto generated charts. Improved date formatting: The process for formatting date results in visualizations has been improved.
why_it_matters: Improved auto generated charts: Visualizations now use query result metadata for higher quality auto generated charts.
plain_summary: Text explanations for empty results: Genie now includes text explanations of query results when query results are empty. Improved auto generated charts: Visualizations now use query result metadata for higher quality auto generated charts.
key_takeaway: Text explanations for empty results: Genie now includes text explanations of query results when query results are empty.
